mapper.select: { CALL sonictmsdev_mssql..USP_INST_PLAN_INS_LISTBYALL ( #{cmpyCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fromDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{toDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instCtgrList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instTypeList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instSeatTypeList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instZoneTypeList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instZoneCdList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dcCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instPlanYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paltNoxx ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instEr ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }

{ CALL sonictmsdev_mssql..USP_INST_PLAN_SAVE ( #{saveGubn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instPlanId ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cmpyCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tblSoMId ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tblSoPId ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tblSoDId ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rqstDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{soNo ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instCtgr ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{instSeatType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instStatCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paltNoxx ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cbm ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instCost ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvyCost ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instCmpy ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instEr ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instPlanDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR},
